sourceName: U.S. Census ACS 2024 5-Year Commuting Characteristics - Greater Seattle Counties
notes: Official U.S. Census ACS 2020-2024 5-year Data Profile DP03 aggregate county estimates. Covers commute mode, work-from-home, and mean travel time for King, Pierce, and Snohomish counties. No individual addresses, names, workplaces, devices, or household-level records are imported.
